onboarding.choose_timezone: What's your timezone? Pick a region:
onboarding.choose_city: Pick a city or type a timezone name (e.g. Europe/London):
onboarding.invalid_timezone: That doesn't look like a valid timezone. Try again or pick from the list.
onboarding.done: You're all set! Feeling is placed on the Russell circumplex model — two axes: • Valence: how pleasant (+ ) or unpleasant (−) • Arousal: how energised (+) or calm (−) Your first check-in will arrive in {min}–{max} hours.
reminder.prompt: How are you feeling? Pick all that apply:
settings.title: Settings
settings.weekly_status: Weekly summary is {status}. Sent on {day} at 09:00.
stats.not_enough_data: Not enough data yet — you need at least {min} check-ins.
help.text: Feelinq — track your emotional state over time. Emotions are placed on the Russell circumplex model: • Valence (x): pleasant → unpleasant • Arousal (y): energised → calm Commands: /start — set up your account /settings — change preferences /stats — view your mood charts /help — this message /feedback — send feedback to the team
feedback.sent: Thanks! Your feedback has been sent.
feedback.missing: Please add your message: /feedback your text here
admin.stats: Admin stats Total users: {total_users} Active (7d): {active_7d} Total entries: {total_entries} Platforms: {platforms}
emotions_chooser.prompt:
Choose the emotions you want to track (6–12).
Pick at least 1 from each group:
emotions_chooser.error_missing_quadrant: Pick at least 1 from each group.
